name: Timbersaw
description: I'm not a lumberjack. This. This is personal. Rizzrack, the Timbersaw The shatters the tree it latched upon Timbersaw reaching it. The tree splinters in all directions, damaging and applying a movement speed slow to affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Exposure Therapy
abilities.description: Timbersaw restores a flat amount of mana per tree destroyed. Now additionally restores a flat amount of health per tree destroyed.

abilities.name: Whirling Death
abilities.description: For Universal enemy heroes, the ability reduces a lesser portion of all of their attributes. Although Sven's has an actual 20.01, the health bar the to health value for the health bar.20 × 22 + 120= 560Hence, Sven now has the aforementioned max health, then Whirling Death applies the.

abilities.name: Timber Chain
abilities.description: Fires a chain that embeds itself in the first tree it hits, pulling Timbersaw towards it. Deals damage to enemy units within Timbersaw's travel path. The shatters the tree it latched upon Timbersaw reaching it. The tree splinters in all directions, damaging and applying a movement speed slow to affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Reactive Armor
abilities.description: Grants bonus armor and bonus health regeneration whenever an enemy hero attacks Timbersaw. The damage barrier explodes when it expires, damaging nearby enemy units corrspondingly to its current barrier value.

abilities.name: Twisted Chakram
abilities.description: Launches a secondary saw-blade that deals damage and applies movement speed slow on affected enemy units based on their current health it passes through, then returns to Timbersaw.

abilities.name: Flamethrower
abilities.description: Releases a destructive flame in the direction Timbersaw is facing. Deals damage per second, applies a movement speed slow and destroys trees within an area.

abilities.name: Chakram
abilities.description: Launches a saw-blade that deals damage, applies a movement speed slow, and cuts down trees in its path when launched and retracted. The saw-blade spins in place, deals damage over time, and applies a movement speed slow to enemy units based on their current health within its proximity once it reaches its area-targeted location.
